schemas._purpose: PM & Scrum Master accelerator program details

data.name: PMAISM Project Management & Scrum Master Career Accelerator
data.description: A 4-6 week live online program covering Agile & Scrum, sprint planning, stakeholder management, AI productivity, interview preparation and career transition. Located in HITEC City, Hyderabad.

schemas._purpose: All 8 FAQs — triggers FAQ rich results in Google + AI Overview citations

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. We start with the core fundamentals of Agile and Scrum before moving into advanced workflows and AI tools. Freshers have successfully transitioned into PM roles through this program.

mainEntity.name: Is this suitable for working professionals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The program is specifically designed with morning batches to accommodate working hours, allowing you to upskill without leaving your current job.
100%. We believe in live mentorship over pre-recorded videos. All sessions are live, interactive, and highly practical.
Yes. We conduct rigorous mock interviews, resume reviews, and portfolio building sessions to ensure you are completely job-ready.

mainEntity.name: Will I receive training on industry-standard PM tools?

acceptedAnswer.text: We provide hands-on training on widely used project management tools including JIRA, Microsoft Project, and Azure DevOps, ensuring you gain practical experience with tools commonly used in real-world PM environments.
Yes. The entire program is delivered online through interactive Zoom sessions, allowing you to join from anywhere.
We provide comprehensive placement assistance including resume building, LinkedIn optimization, interview prep, and sharing relevant opportunities.
Unlike generic certification mills, we focus on real-world execution. You learn the actual workflows, AI tools, and stakeholder management skills required to survive and thrive on the job.
